title: helichrysum summo-montanum
intro: Helichrysum summo-montanum, also known as mountain curry plant, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum summo-montanum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum summo-montanum include essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
